comment: Read an image with its notes pinned right to the regions they describe.
_showoff: Box a pinned mark on the canvas.

comment: Click a mark and the camera fits and highlights it; click a whole-object mark and a thin colour border frames the entire image.
_showoff: Two behaviours; box a region mark and a whole-object border.

comment: Selecting a note floats its card in beside the canvas; with the sidebar open, the camera centres the mark in the space you can still see.
Hover a note in the list and its mark solos on the canvas — everything else fades.
The note list is a sidebar you can drag to resize or collapse; your preference is remembered next time.
_showoff: Box the divider; a collapsed-sidebar variant shows the toggle.

comment: Long note? Expand it into a centred reading sheet over a dimmed backdrop.
On touch, scroll the note list without panning the canvas — the two never fight.
